title: Celebrating Aisha JAMB Score of 320!
summary: Aisha Abdulrahmon from Lagos scored an impressive 320 in the 2026 UTME after following Big Quams Media guides. Congratulations!
content:
We are incredibly proud to celebrate Aisha Abdulrahmon who scored 320 in the 2026 UTME examination!

Aisha reached out to Big Quams Media for JAMB advisory support and worked diligently through our study resources, past questions, and coaching sessions.

Her hard work paid off with one of the highest scores in her cohort. She plans to study Medicine and Surgery at the University of Ibadan.

Well done Aisha √¢¬Ä¬î you are an inspiration to every Nigerian student! Big Quams Media is proud of you. √∞¬ü¬é¬ì
